text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to eat lunch, when I once<n>again spot
two familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right! Permission to cook here has<n>been
obtained! Let's get down to<n>business!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's really knock it out of the<n>park with
these sandwiches!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a guaranteed roaring success!<n>I put all my
love into buying these<n>vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, very colorful! You really chose<n>a lot of green
and yellow ones, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Everyone always says they<n>want to eat
more veggies! A nutritious<n>diet is the key to good
running, after<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'm going to make<n>some healthy
and nutrient-packed<n>sandwiches! That'll really
help<n>everyone achieve their goals!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see how well they<n>cook this time
and take a seat nearby<n>to watch.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Stir the eggs, then it's time for... OIL!<n>Pour in a ton
of oil, then st—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Stop! Please! The recipe says only a<n>little oil!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Too much will give it<n>too many
calories. I'll just lightly<n>drizzle it then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Next is to fry it for five minutes! Okay!<n>Turning the
heat to MAX, and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wait!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I understand! The only thing Ishould set aflame is my own heart!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll pour my heart into it for five<n>minutes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HAAAAAH! You all work so hard,<n>everyone! Keep
up the good fight!<n>Bakushin it up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Done!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oooooh! It looks so good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Doesn't it?! That's just what<n>good class
representatives like me<n>do!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You really are the perfect class<n>representative! I
know everyone is<n>going to be thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, stop! Do you really think so? Oh,go on! You're sooo right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They must be bursting with<n>anticipation! Hehe, I
think I can hear<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Agh! What am I waiting for?! I must<n>bring the
people what they want!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAAAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! W-wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're going to crush the<n>sandwicheees!
